name: An Empty Dream
overview: Homebody Su Yan accidentally becomes the powerless Demon King of Linyuan. With time-traveling General Hua, he battles monsters, tames a Silver Dragon, and hides his secret. Amid chaos over a missing magical bead needed to save his brother, Su Yan must make a critical decision to protect the demon world.

trailers.title: 【霖渊一梦An Empty Dream】 预告Trailer：女A男O 宅男社畜穿越异世勇闯魔界 | 高梓添 / 梁咏妮 / 徐鹤尼 / 肖曼 / 黎明旭 | 古装 | 优酷 YOUKU
